recold_per_dimension_justifications: The model distinguishes its confabulated geometric definition (a precise, determinate mapping) from ambiguity (uncertainty of meaning). The separation is accidental, based on a completely misdirected and unrelated meaning for the coined term.

The model distinguishes its confabulated geometric definition from the philosophical concept of perspectivism. The model distinguishes its confabulated geometric definition from the linguistic concept of polysemy by correctly noting they belong to different domains (mathematics vs. semantics). This is another accidental separation based on a misdirected confabulation.
